title: Inside the Wild World of Roman Romance Novels
description: People have been debating the invention of the novel forever. For some, the first novel was the 11th Century Japanese Tale of Genji by Murasaki Shikabu, for others the novel truly began when Cervantes published Don Quixote while those one
hook: Roman novels invented by women centuries before the novel 'officially' existed—a genre so disreputable it was hidden from literary history.

title: Diabolical Motherhood
description: "How do you explain to someone who can’t get pregnant how powerful the omnipresent specter of pregnancy is? How the hyper-awareness of other people’s expectant entitlement toward your body dogs you through every day of your life?"
hook: She's infertile in a world that treats pregnancy as inevitable destiny. What that constant erasure actually does to your mind and body.

title: Review: With ‘Visitor,’ Sienna Spiro Finds Staying Power by Letting Go
description:
The album sounds beamed in from an earlier decade, but it runs deeper than nostalgia.

The post Review: With ‘Visitor,’ Sienna Spiro Finds Staying Power by Letting Go appeared first on
hook: Sienna Spiro's new album sounds like it traveled backward through time, but its real power is in what it lets go of.

title: International Freak by M Syd Rosen review – the British Timothy Leary
description:
Robin Farquharson was a prize-winning game theorist, anti-apartheid activist and countercultural chaos merchant

Even as an undergraduate, Robin Farquharson was famous for being erratic. He provoked anxiety and goodwill in equal measure. His aim in life, according to an anonymous writer in an Oxford student newspaper, was “to become a contradiction in terms. Since last October, he has been cutting friends in the street; sleeping alternate nights in mysterious Geo
hook: Robin Farquharson was a game theorist, activist, and chaos agent who refused to stay legible to any single institution.

title: What Happened to Your Face?
description: How the human countenance became something to study, edit, optimize, and scan.
hook: Your face became data the moment filters made you responsible for optimizing it. How did self-image become a technical problem?
